entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The primary cereal crop discussed for conservation and improvement

entities.name: GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Biological material containing genetic information used to increase productivity, improve nutrition, and enhance climate resilience

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The capacity of the crop to produce a high yield of agricultural output

entities.name: NUTRITION
entities.description: The quality and nutrient density of the crop for human consumption

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to maintain productivity under adverse climate conditions

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring all people have access to sufficient, safe, and nutritious food

entities.name: CROP WILD RELATIVES
entities.description: Wild species related to pearl millet that are conserved in their natural habitats

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: Traditional varieties of pearl millet conserved on-farm

entities.name: IN SITU CONSERVATION
entities.description: The conservation of genetic resources within their natural habitats or on farms

entities.name: EX SITU CONSERVATION
entities.description: The conservation of genetic resources outside their natural habitats, such as in seedbanks

entities.name: SEEDBANKS
entities.description: Facilities used for the long-term storage of seeds as a method of ex situ conservation

entities.name: GENEBANKS
entities.description: Institutions that conserve and manage genetic resources for various crops

entities.name: ICRISAT GENEBANK
entities.description: A specific genebank that conserves the largest collection of pearl millet accessions

entities.name: TAXONOMICAL AND GAP ANALYSES
entities.description: Methods used to identify missing genetic diversity within a crop collection

entities.name: GENE POOL
entities.description: The total genetic diversity available within the pearl millet species

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic material used for breeding and crop improvement

entities.name: CORE AND MINI-CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Strategically reduced subsets of germplasm that represent the overall genetic diversity

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: A trait referring to the quantity of crop produced

entities.name: NUTRIENTS
entities.description: A trait referring to the nutritional components of the crop

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental pressures caused by living organisms, such as pests and diseases

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental pressures caused by non-living factors, such as drought

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing crop traits through breeding and genetic resources

entities.name: TRAIT DISCOVERY
entities.description: The process of identifying specific traits within germplasm for breeding purposes
